PRF-001.textEn: What type of entity is it?
PRF-001.purposeEn: Determine the nature of the entity and the assessment pathway

PRF-002.textEn: What is the entity's primary sector?

PRF-003.textEn: What is the size of the entity?
PRF-003.purposeEn: Determine the Lite/Core/Full pathway and burden fairness

PRF-004.textEn: How many operational sites does the entity have?
PRF-004.purposeEn: Determine the assessment unit and the level of site complexity

PRF-005.textEn: Does the entity have field or operational activities that affect the environment?
PRF-005.purposeEn: Determine activation of performance and site questions

PRF-006.textEn: Does the entity use or store chemical or hazardous materials?

PRF-007.textEn: Does the entity generate any type of hazardous or special waste?
PRF-007.purposeEn: Activate hazardous waste and tracking questions

PRF-008.textEn: Is there industrial or non-domestic discharge associated with the activity?

PRF-009.textEn: Are any of the entity's sites located near a protected area or environmentally sensitive zone?
PRF-009.purposeEn: Activate the nature and sensitive sites module

PRF-010.textEn: Is the entity listed or does it have sustainability or climate disclosure obligations?
PRF-010.purposeEn: Activate advanced disclosure and climate questions

PRF-011.textEn: What time period does the assessment cover?
PRF-011.purposeEn: Determine the data period and baseline

PRF-012.textEn: What is the assessment unit adopted for this cycle?
PRF-012.purposeEn: Determine whether the assessment is at the entity, site, or activity level

APP-001.textEn: Do the entity's activities require an environmental permit or environmental approval?

APP-002.textEn: Are there stationary air emission sources within the assessment scope?
APP-002.purposeEn: Activate air and stationary emissions questions

APP-003.textEn: Does the entity own or operate a transport fleet or mobile equipment with fuel consumption?

APP-004.textEn: Are there operations or sites that require special waste management?

APP-005.textEn: Is there significant water use or water-dependent activities?

APP-006.textEn: Does the entity contract with suppliers or contractors that have a direct environmental impact?

APP-007.textEn: Do the entity's activities include construction, excavation, or site development works?
APP-007.purposeEn: Activate soil, construction, and habitat questions

APP-008.textEn: Are there activities or sites associated with the marine or coastal environment?

APP-009.textEn: Does the entity have approved quantitative environmental targets?

APP-010.textEn: Is environmental performance data available for a previous year or baseline?

APP-011.textEn: Are there regulatory limits or numerical requirements applicable to any environmental indicator?

APP-012.textEn: Does the entity have environmental improvement initiatives implemented during the last 12 months?

GOV-001.textEn: Does the entity have an environmental policy approved by senior management?

GOV-002.textEn: Have clear responsibilities and authorities been defined for environmental management?

GOV-003.textEn: Are there approved quantitative or qualitative environmental targets?

GOV-004.textEn: Is environmental performance reviewed periodically by senior management?
GOV-004.purposeEn: Measure integration of the environment into management decision-making

GOV-005.textEn: Is there an environmental training or awareness plan linked to risks and activities?

GOV-006.textEn: Is there an internal mechanism for reporting environmental incidents or complaints?
GOV-006.purposeEn: Measure the ability to detect problems

GOV-007.textEn: Are policies or targets updated based on measurement results and incidents?

GOV-008.textEn: Is there a mechanism to identify environmental trade-offs among energy, water, waste, and materials?

GOV-009.textEn: Does the entity use environmental assessment results to prioritize investment or improvement?
GOV-009.purposeEn: Measure the use of results in decision-making

GOV-010.textEn: Is there a mechanism to maintain and update environmental records in an auditable manner?
GOV-010.purposeEn: Measure digital or manual governance of records

REG-001.textEn: Does the entity maintain an up-to-date register of the environmental requirements applicable to it?

REG-002.textEn: Has the entity obtained the environmental permits or approvals required for its activities?

REG-003.textEn: Are permit or approval conditions monitored periodically?

REG-004.textEn: Does the entity have any open environmental violations during the last 12 months?

REG-005.textEn: What is the closure rate of corrective actions related to violations or observations?

REG-006.textEn: Is there a mechanism to monitor relevant regulatory updates?

REG-007.textEn: Are the environmental reports or correspondence required by the competent authorities documented?

REG-008.textEn: Are there numerical limits or performance requirements that are measured and compared regularly?

REG-009.textEn: Has any exceedance of regulatory limits occurred during the last 12 months?

REG-010.textEn: Has the number of regulatory violations or observations decreased compared to the previous period?

DAT-001.textEn: Are there approved environmental performance indicators covering the material areas?
DAT-001.purposeEn: Measure the entity's ability to move from documentation to performance

DAT-002.textEn: Is environmental data updated periodically and at defined intervals?

DAT-003.textEn: Does the environmental data cover all sites or activities within the assessment scope?

DAT-004.textEn: Are there documented sources for the environmental figures entered?

DAT-005.textEn: Is an internal review or sanity check of environmental data performed before it is used?

DAT-006.textEn: Are there time gaps in the performance data during the assessment period?
DAT-006.purposeEn: Measure the completeness of the time series

DAT-007.textEn: What percentage of performance indicators have a documented baseline?

DAT-008.textEn: What percentage of performance indicators showed improvement during the last 12 months?

CLM-001.textEn: Does the entity measure electricity and energy consumption periodically?

CLM-002.textEn: What is the total electricity consumption during the assessment period?

CLM-003.textEn: What was the electricity consumption in the baseline or previous period?

CLM-004.textEn: What is the percentage change in electricity consumption compared to the baseline?

CLM-005.textEn: Are there implemented initiatives to reduce energy consumption?

CLM-006.textEn: What is the documented reduction in energy consumption resulting from the initiatives?
CLM-006.purposeEn: Measure the impact of the initiatives

CLM-007.textEn: Does the entity have an energy intensity indicator appropriate to the nature of its activity?

CLM-008.textEn: Does the entity account for Scope 1 emissions?

CLM-009.textEn: Does the entity account for Scope 2 emissions?

CLM-010.textEn: Does the entity account for material Scope 3 emissions?

CLM-011.textEn: Have any emissions data been externally verified?
CLM-011.purposeEn: Increase the reliability of climate data

CLM-012.textEn: Does the entity have a time-bound emissions or energy reduction target?

CLM-013.textEn: What is the progress toward the emissions or energy reduction target?

CLM-014.textEn: Does the entity assess climate risks to its business or sites?

CLM-015.textEn: Have any operational or investment decisions been made based on energy or emissions data?

WAT-002.textEn: What is the total water consumption during the assessment period?

WAT-003.textEn: What was the water consumption in the baseline or previous period?

WAT-004.textEn: What is the percentage change in water consumption compared to the baseline?

WAT-005.textEn: Are there water intensity indicators appropriate to the activity?

WAT-006.textEn: Is there industrial discharge within the assessment scope?
WAT-006.purposeEn: Determine the applicability of discharge quality

WAT-007.textEn: Is industrial discharge quality analyzed periodically where applicable?

WAT-008.textEn: Have discharge quality results improved compared to the previous period or the required limits?

WAT-009.textEn: Are there initiatives to reuse water or reduce consumption?

WAT-010.textEn: What is the quantity or percentage of water reused or saved during the assessment period?
WAT-010.purposeEn: Measure the impact of water initiatives

WAT-011.textEn: Have any exceedances or incidents related to water or discharge been recorded during the last 12 months?

WAT-012.textEn: Have the corrective actions for water incidents or exceedances been closed?

WST-001.textEn: Does the entity maintain a register of waste types and quantities?

WST-002.textEn: What is the total quantity of waste generated during the assessment period?

WST-003.textEn: What was the waste quantity in the baseline or previous period?

WST-004.textEn: What is the percentage change in waste quantity compared to the baseline?

WST-005.textEn: Is waste classified by type and hazard?

WST-006.textEn: Is waste handled through licensed providers where needed?

WST-007.textEn: Are there tracking documents for the fate of the waste?
WST-007.purposeEn: Prove the final fate of the waste

WST-008.textEn: What percentage of waste is diverted from landfill or recycled?

WST-009.textEn: Are there initiatives to reduce waste at source?

WST-010.textEn: What quantity of waste was reduced or avoided as a result of the initiatives?
WST-010.purposeEn: Measure the impact of waste reduction

HAZ-001.textEn: Does the entity maintain an up-to-date register of hazardous materials?

HAZ-002.textEn: Are SDS/MSDS available for all hazardous materials?

HAZ-003.textEn: Are hazardous materials stored in a safe and appropriate manner?
HAZ-003.purposeEn: Reduce the risk of leaks and incidents

HAZ-004.textEn: Is there a response plan for spills and leaks?

HAZ-005.textEn: Have any spills or leaks occurred during the last 12 months?

HAZ-006.textEn: Has the number or severity of spills decreased compared to the previous period?

NAT-001.textEn: Has the environmental sensitivity of the entity's sites been determined using maps or reliable sources?

NAT-002.textEn: Is any site located within or near a protected area or environmentally sensitive zone?

NAT-003.textEn: Has the activity's impact on biodiversity or habitats been assessed?

NAT-004.textEn: Is there a plan to mitigate the impact on nature or for rehabilitation?

NAT-005.textEn: Is the activity's impact on habitats, species, or vegetation cover monitored after implementation?

NAT-006.textEn: Has the condition of the affected site improved or has rehabilitation been completed compared to the baseline?

NAT-007.textEn: Are there activities that may lead to habitat fragmentation or impede the movement of organisms?

NAT-008.textEn: Has the entity's or project's dependence on ecosystem services been identified?
NAT-008.purposeEn: Introduce the concept of dependence on nature

NAT-009.textEn: Are there any complaints or incidents related to nature or habitats during the last 12 months?

NAT-010.textEn: Have nature-related incidents or complaints decreased compared to the previous period?

SOIL-001.textEn: Are there activities that may affect soil or cause contamination or erosion?

SOIL-002.textEn: Has any soil contamination or disturbance been assessed or monitored at the relevant sites?

SOIL-003.textEn: Have measures been implemented to prevent or remediate soil contamination or erosion?

SOIL-004.textEn: Have soil indicators improved or have contaminated areas been closed compared to the baseline?

MAR-001.textEn: Are there activities that may affect the marine or coastal environment?
MAR-001.purposeEn: Activate the marine and coastal module

MAR-002.textEn: Has the activity's impact on coastal or marine systems been assessed?

MAR-003.textEn: Are there measures to prevent pollution or disturbance of the marine or coastal environment?

MAR-004.textEn: Has improvement or non-deterioration of marine or coastal environment indicators been monitored compared to the baseline?

SUP-001.textEn: Does the entity have a list of suppliers or contractors with high environmental impact?

SUP-002.textEn: Do supplier or contractor contracts include appropriate environmental clauses?

SUP-003.textEn: Are the licenses or competence of environmental service providers such as waste or transport verified?

SUP-004.textEn: Is the environmental performance of key suppliers or contractors evaluated?
SUP-004.purposeEn: Measure the management of indirect impact

SUP-005.textEn: Is there a green procurement policy or criteria?

SUP-006.textEn: Is environmental data related to suppliers, such as transport, packaging, or materials, tracked?

SUP-007.textEn: Has the environmental impact of key suppliers, packaging materials, or transport decreased compared to the baseline?

SUP-008.textEn: Are environmental requirements included in the evaluation and selection of new suppliers?

SUP-009.textEn: Is there a plan to address suppliers with poor environmental performance?

SUP-010.textEn: Are the emissions or impacts of external transport associated with suppliers measured or estimated?

REP-001.textEn: Does the entity issue an environmental or sustainability report?

REP-002.textEn: Are water, waste, or emissions indicators disclosed?

REP-003.textEn: Have any published environmental data been externally verified?

REP-004.textEn: Is there an internal dashboard for environmental performance?

REP-005.textEn: Are periodic environmental reports submitted to senior management?

REP-006.textEn: Does the entity use measurement results in improvement or prioritization decisions?
REP-006.purposeEn: Measure the impact of reporting on decision-making

IMP-001.textEn: Is there an approved environmental improvement plan based on clear gaps?

IMP-002.textEn: Are improvement initiatives linked to performance indicators, responsibilities, and dates?

IMP-003.textEn: What percentage of improvement initiatives were completed on time?

IMP-004.textEn: What is the documented environmental impact of the completed initiatives?

IMP-005.textEn: Is the environmental or financial return of significant initiatives calculated?

IMP-006.textEn: Are there circular economy or environmental innovation initiatives?

IMP-007.textEn: Has the impact of the circular economy or innovation initiatives been measured?

SYS-001.textEn: Is there a matrix linking each improvement initiative to the expected environmental impact?
SYS-001.purposeEn: Prevent improvement not linked to impact

SYS-002.textEn: Are the trade-offs between reducing water consumption and increasing energy consumption, or vice versa, analyzed?

SYS-003.textEn: Is the impact of waste management on carbon emissions, or vice versa, analyzed?
SYS-003.purposeEn: Test the interdependence between waste and climate

SYS-004.textEn: Are gaps prioritized according to environmental impact, risk, cost, and implementation capacity?

SYS-005.textEn: Are there Outcome indicators independent of indicators of the existence of policies and procedures?
SYS-005.purposeEn: Confirm the existence of an actual results layer

SYS-006.textEn: What percentage of assessment questions or items have impact or outcome evidence and not only existence evidence?
SYS-006.purposeEn: Measure the quality of the measurement system itself

SYS-007.textEn: Is there a periodic review of the effectiveness of the assessment system itself after each cycle?
optionsEn: Leading to improvement of the questions

SYS-008.textEn: Are internal benchmarking results used to set realistic improvement targets?

AIR-001.textEn: Are there stationary or operational air emission sources within the assessment scope?
AIR-001.purposeEn: Confirm the applicability of the air module

AIR-002.textEn: Are air emissions measured or monitored where applicable?

AIR-003.textEn: What is the current emission or air quality indicator value for the most significant source or site?
optionsEn: Value by indicator and unit of measurement

AIR-004.textEn: What is the emission or air quality indicator value in the baseline or previous period?
AIR-004.purposeEn: Enable a before/after comparison for air
optionsEn: Value by indicator and unit of measurement

AIR-005.textEn: Have emissions or air quality indicators improved compared to the baseline or the regulatory limits?

AIR-006.textEn: Have any exceedances or complaints related to emissions or air quality occurred during the last 12 months?

NAT-011.textEn: What percentage of the affected habitat area or sites has been restored or rehabilitated during the assessment period?
NAT-011.purposeEn: Measure an actual outcome of rehabilitation programs, not merely the existence of a plan.

NAT-012.textEn: Do the monitoring results show improvement or stability in biodiversity indicators compared to the baseline?
NAT-012.purposeEn: Measure the actual trend of biodiversity indicators.

NAT-013.textEn: Has the activity's impact on habitat connectivity or fragmentation been measured, and have measures been implemented to address it where needed?
NAT-013.purposeEn: Test the activity's impact on ecological connectivity between habitats.

NAT-014.textEn: Has the entity's or project's dependence on ecosystem services and the impact of the activity on these services been assessed?
NAT-014.purposeEn: Measure the relationship between the activity and ecosystem services, not just sensitive sites.

NAT-015.textEn: Are the results of rehabilitation or mitigation monitored after implementation to confirm their success?
NAT-015.purposeEn: Prevent settling for implementing a measure without measuring its success.
optionsEn: Monitoring that proves success or continuous correction

SUP-011.textEn: What percentage of high-risk suppliers or contractors underwent an environmental assessment during the last 12 months?
SUP-011.purposeEn: Measure the assessment coverage of the most environmentally material suppliers.

SUP-012.textEn: What percentage of high-risk suppliers showed documented improvement in environmental performance compared to the previous period?
SUP-012.purposeEn: Measure the impact of the supplier program on actual improvement.

SUP-013.textEn: Has the transport, packaging, or materials impact associated with suppliers been reduced compared to the baseline?
SUP-013.purposeEn: Measure a tangible impact in transport, packaging, or materials within the supply chain.

SUP-014.textEn: What percentage of environmental non-compliance cases among high-risk suppliers have been closed or corrected?
SUP-014.purposeEn: Measure the entity's ability to improve suppliers or close their risks.

SUP-015.textEn: Is quantitative data available on the environmental impact of the most material suppliers, such as emissions, waste, water, or transport?
SUP-015.purposeEn: Test the availability of real impact data from the most material suppliers.

CIR-001.textEn: Is there a map of the main material flows entering and leaving operations?
CIR-001.purposeEn: Establish circular economy measurement through understanding material flows.

CIR-002.textEn: What percentage of materials are recovered, reused, or recycled out of total outgoing materials?
CIR-002.purposeEn: Measure the circular economy outcome, not merely the existence of an initiative.

CIR-003.textEn: Has resource productivity improved compared to the baseline, such as output or service per unit of material, water, or energy?
CIR-003.purposeEn: Measure resource use efficiency on a normalized basis.

CIR-004.textEn: Has a product, service, or process been designed to reduce waste, extend material life, or facilitate reuse?
CIR-004.purposeEn: Measure the integration of circular thinking into design or operations.

CIR-005.textEn: What is the financial or operational value generated from material recovery or waste reduction during the assessment period?
CIR-005.purposeEn: Link the circular economy to measurable value.

CIR-006.textEn: Are there external partnerships to convert waste or by-products into valuable inputs?
CIR-006.purposeEn: Measure circular integration opportunities beyond the entity's boundaries.

CIR-007.textEn: Is the ratio of reliance on virgin raw materials versus recycled or recovered materials tracked?
CIR-007.purposeEn: Measure the shift in resource inputs, not just waste outputs.

CIR-008.textEn: Is the impact of circular economy initiatives on emissions, water, or waste tracked to avoid shifting the impact from one area to another?
CIR-008.purposeEn: Introduce systems logic and trade-offs into the evaluation of circular economy initiatives.
optionsEn: Documented improvement without shifting a negative impact
